name: Corning Incorporated
description: Corning Incorporated is a leading global innovator in materials science, specializing in glass science, ceramic science, and optical physics. For more than 170 years, the company has developed life-changing innovations and category-defining products in areas such as optical communications, mobile consumer electronics, display technology, automotive, and life sciences vessels. Corning's best-known products include damage-resistant cover glass for mobile devices, precision glass for advanced displays, optical fiber and connectivity solutions for high-speed networks, and trusted vessels for drug discovery and delivery.
